channel.title: Tools on Mohit Sharma
channel.description: Recent content in Tools on Mohit Sharma

item.title: Getting comfortable with Machine Learning on Servers
item.description: A lot of new members often ask around everyone about how to work with servers. I thought it would be nice if I can put everything in one place. This post will be about a list of things you need to know, and then you can google for any expanded tutorial for it. I will write based on what I have experienced and what we face daily at MIDAS Lab. If you were to take away only one useful tip from this article, it should be Be Polite to the people that are sharing the server.
